006package com.stuypulse.robot;
007
008import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.DoNothingAuton;
009import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.BC_Dots.LBCenterDotDot;
010import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.BC_Dots.LeftDot;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.BC_Dots.RBCenterDotDot;
012import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.BC_Dots.RightDot;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.depot.CenterDepot;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.FrontHubShootPreloads;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.LBDumpy;
016import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.RBDumpy;
017import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.compound.StopShooting;
018import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.LBOnePointFiveSpiralAngled;
019import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.LBOneSweepAngled;
020import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.LBTwoSweepAngled;
021import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.feeder.FeederSetForward;
022import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.feeder.FeederSetIdle;
023import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.handoff.HandoffSetForward;
024import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.handoff.HandoffSetIdle;
025import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeAgitateFastOnce;
026import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetHomingDown;
027import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIdle;
028import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIntake;
029import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetOuttake;
030import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.leds.LEDDefaultCommand;
031import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterAddToBonusVelocity;
032import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterFirstShotIncrease;
033import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterResetBonusVelocity;
034import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetFerry;
035import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetManual;
036import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetShoot;
037import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterWaitForSpinUp;
038import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveDrive;
039import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveResetRotation;
040import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveXMode;
041import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned.SwerveDriveAlignToFerryZone;
042import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned.SwerveDriveAlignToHub;
043import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Field;
044import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Ports;
045import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.feeder.Feeder;
046import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.handoff.Handoff;
047import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.intake.Intake;
048import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.leds.LEDController;
049import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter.Shooter;
050import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
051import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.vision.LimelightVision;
052import com.stuypulse.robot.util.PathUtil.AutonConfig;
053
054import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SendableChooser;
055import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SmartDashboard;
056import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
057import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Commands;
058import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.WaitCommand;
059import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.CommandXboxController;
060import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.Trigger;
061import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.sysid.SysIdRoutine.Direction;
062
063/**
064 * <h2>Robot Container Class</h2>
065 * 
066 * This class is where the bulk of the robot should be declared. Since Command-based is a
067 * "declarative" paradigm, very little robot logic should actually be handled in the {@link Robot}
068 * periodic methods (other than the scheduler calls). Instead, the structure of the robot (including
069 * subsystems, commands, and trigger mappings) should be declared here.
070 */
071public class RobotContainer {
072
073    // Gamepads
074    public final CommandXboxController driver = new CommandXboxController(Ports.Gamepad.DRIVER);
075
076    // Subsystem
077    private final Feeder feeder = Feeder.getInstance();
078
079    private final Intake intake = Intake.getInstance();
080
081    private final Shooter shooter = Shooter.getInstance();
082
083    private final CommandSwerveDrivetrain swerve = CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance();
084
085    private final LimelightVision vision = LimelightVision.getInstance();
086
087    private final LEDController leds = LEDController.getInstance();
088
089    private final Handoff handoff = Handoff.getInstance();
090
091    // Autons
092    private static SendableChooser<Command> autonChooser = new SendableChooser<>();
093
094    // Robot container
095
096    /** The container for the robot. Contains subsystems, OI devices, and commands. */
097    public RobotContainer() {
098        swerve.configureAutoBuilder();
099        configureDefaultCommands();
100        configureButtonBindings();
101        configureAutons();
102        SmartDashboard.putData("Field", Field.FIELD2D);
103    }
104
105    /** ************ */
106    /** DEFAULTS ** */
107    /** ************ */
108    private void configureDefaultCommands() {
109        swerve.setDefaultCommand(new SwerveDriveDrive(driver));
110        leds.setDefaultCommand(new LEDDefaultCommand());
111    }
112
113    /***************/
114    /*** BUTTONS ***/
115    /***************/
116
117    /**
118     * This method is used to configure button bindings for controlling the robot.
119   */
120    private void configureButtonBindings() {
121        // Trigger buttons did not work for some reason so I had to do this
122        Trigger leftTrigger = new Trigger(() -> driver.getLeftTriggerAxis() > 0.5);
123        Trigger rightTrigger = new Trigger(() -> driver.getRightTriggerAxis() > 0.5);
124
125        leftTrigger.onTrue(new IntakeSetIntake());
126        driver.leftBumper().whileTrue(new IntakeSetOuttake());
127        driver.leftBumper().onFalse(new IntakeSetIntake());
128
129        rightTrigger.whileTrue(
130                new WaitCommand(1.5).raceWith(new SwerveDriveAlignToHub())
131                .andThen(new SwerveDriveXMode())
132                .andThen(new ShooterSetShoot())
133                .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
134                .andThen(new HandoffSetForward()
135                .alongWith(new FeederSetForward(),
136                    new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly(),
137                    new ShooterFirstShotIncrease())));
138        rightTrigger.onFalse(
139            new StopShooting()
140        );
141
142        // Top Left Paddle
143        driver.y().onTrue(new IntakeSetIdle());
144        
145        driver.rightBumper()
146            .whileTrue(
147                new WaitCommand(1.5).raceWith(new SwerveDriveAlignToFerryZone())
148                    .andThen(new SwerveDriveXMode())
149                    .andThen(new ShooterSetFerry())
150                    .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
151                    .andThen(new HandoffSetForward())
152                    .alongWith(new FeederSetForward(), 
153                        new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly(),
154                        new ShooterFirstShotIncrease()));
155        driver.rightBumper()
156            .onFalse(
157                new StopShooting()
158            );
159        // Manual shooting possibly from in front of the tower
160        driver.a()
161            .whileTrue(
162                new SwerveDriveXMode()
163                    .andThen(new ShooterSetManual())
164                    .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
165                    .andThen(new HandoffSetForward().repeatedly())
166                    .alongWith(new FeederSetForward().repeatedly(), 
167                        new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly(),
168                        new ShooterFirstShotIncrease()));
169        driver.a()
170            .onFalse(
171                new StopShooting()
172            );
173
174        driver.b()  
175            .whileTrue(
176                new SwerveDriveXMode()
177                    .andThen(new ShooterSetShoot())
178                    .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
179                    .andThen(new HandoffSetForward().repeatedly())
180                    .alongWith(new FeederSetForward().repeatedly(), 
181                        new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly(),
182                        new ShooterFirstShotIncrease())
183            );
184        driver.b()
185            .onFalse(
186                new StopShooting()
187            );
188
189        // Bottom Left Paddle
190        driver.x().whileTrue(new SwerveDriveXMode());
191
192        driver.povLeft().onTrue(new SwerveDriveResetRotation());
193        
194        driver.povUp()
195            .onTrue(new ShooterAddToBonusVelocity(50));
196        driver.povDown()
197            .onTrue(new ShooterAddToBonusVelocity(-50));
198        driver.povRight()
199            .onTrue(new ShooterResetBonusVelocity());
200
201    }
202
203    /**************/
204    /*** AUTONS ***/
205    /**************/
206
207    /**
208     * This method is used to configure the autonomous commands.
209     */
210     public void configureAutons() {
211        autonChooser.addOption("Do Nothing", new DoNothingAuton());
212        // DOT
213        AutonConfig LB_ToBCCenter = new AutonConfig("LB To BC Center", LBCenterDotDot::new,
214            "LB to BC Center"
215        );
216        LB_ToBCCenter.register(autonChooser);
217        AutonConfig LB_ToBCLeft = new AutonConfig("LB To BC Left", LeftDot::new,
218            "LB to BC Left"
219        );
220        LB_ToBCLeft.register(autonChooser);
221        AutonConfig RB_ToBCCenter = new AutonConfig("RB To BC Center", RBCenterDotDot::new,
222            "RB to BC Center"
223        );
224        RB_ToBCCenter.register(autonChooser);
225        AutonConfig RB_ToBCRight = new AutonConfig("RB To BC Right", RightDot::new,
226            "RB to BC Right"
227        );
228        RB_ToBCRight.register(autonChooser);
229
230        // SHOOT
231        AutonConfig frontHubShootPreloads = new AutonConfig("Front Hub Shoot Preloads", FrontHubShootPreloads::new,
232            "Front Hub Shoot Preloads"
233        );
234        frontHubShootPreloads.register(autonChooser);
235        AutonConfig LB_OneSweepAngled = new AutonConfig("LB 1 Sweep Angled", LBOneSweepAngled::new,
236            "LB to Mid Neutral RF",
237            "Mid Neutral RF to LB Shoot"
238        );
239        LB_OneSweepAngled.register(autonChooser);
240        AutonConfig LB_TwoSweepAngled = new AutonConfig("LB 2 Sweep Angled", LBTwoSweepAngled::new, 
241            "LB to Mid Neutral RF",
242            "Mid Neutral RF to LB Shoot",
243            "LB Shoot to LB Start",
244            "LB to Mid Neutral RF",
245            "Mid Neutral RF to LB Shoot"
246        );
247        LB_TwoSweepAngled.register(autonChooser);
248        AutonConfig LB_OnePointFiveSpiralAngled = new AutonConfig("LB 1.5 Spiral Angled", LBOnePointFiveSpiralAngled::new, 
249            "LB to Mid Neutral RF",
250            "Mid Neutral RF Spiral",
251            "Mid Neutral RF to LB Shoot",
252            "LB Shoot to LB Start",
253            "LB to Mid Neutral RF"
254        );
255        LB_OnePointFiveSpiralAngled.register(autonChooser);
256
257        AutonConfig LB_Dumpy = new AutonConfig("LB Dumpy", LBDumpy::new,
258            "LB to N Dumpy",
259            "LB Intake Dumpy",
260            "LB Backsweep Dumpy",
261            "LB Shoot Dumpy",
262            "LB Shoot to Depot");
263        LB_Dumpy.register(autonChooser);
264
265
266        AutonConfig centerDepot = new AutonConfig("Center Depot", CenterDepot::new,
267            "Hub to Depot",
268            "Tower shoot");
269        centerDepot.register(autonChooser);
270
271        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Dynamic Forwards",
272        // swerve.sysIdDynamic(Direction.kForward));
273        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Dynamic Backwards",
274        // swerve.sysIdDynamic(Direction.kReverse));
275        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Quasi Forwards",
276        // swerve.sysIdQuasistatic(Direction.kForward));
277        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Quasi Backwards",
278        // swerve.sysIdQuasistatic(Direction.kReverse));
279        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Dynamic Forwards",
280        // swerve.sysidRotationDynamic(Direction.kForward));
281        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Dynamic Backwards",
282        // swerve.sysidRotationDynamic(Direction.kReverse));
283        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Quasi Forwards",
284        // swerve.sysidRotationQuasiStatic(Direction.kForward));
285        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Quasi Backwards",
286        // swerve.sysidRotationQuasiStatic(Direction.kReverse));
287        SmartDashboard.putData("Autonomous", autonChooser);
288    }
289
290    /**
291     * Use this to pass the autonomous command to the main {@link Robot} class.
292     * @return The command to run in autonomous
293     */
294    public Command getAutonomousCommand() {
295        return autonChooser.getSelected();
296    }
297}
